# PNG Toolz
> Papua New Guinea's platform for renting and buying professional mobile phone servicing software tools.

PNG Toolz provides technicians across Papua New Guinea with access to professional-grade software tools used for mobile phone unlocking, firmware repair, IMEI restoration and device customization — available for hourly rental or subscription purchase.

## Services
- Tool rentals: 6-hour, 12-hour, and 24-hour sessions
- Subscription purchases for permanent tool access
- Supported tool brands: Chimera Pro, UFi Box, Octoplus Pro
- Supported device brands: Samsung, Huawei, Oppo, Vivo, Xiaomi, LG, Sony, Motorola

## How It Works
1. Browse available tools at pngtoolz.com/tools
2. Create a free account
3. Select rental duration or buy a subscription
4. Pay via local PNG payment methods (BSP, Kina Bank, MoniPlus)
5. Receive access credentials in your dashboard once payment is confirmed

## Location & Coverage
- Based in Papua New Guinea (Port Moresby, NCD)
- Serving technicians across all PNG provinces
- All prices in Papua New Guinea Kina (PGK)
- Payment via BSP Bank Transfer, Kina Bank Transfer, MoniPlus Mobile Money

## Contact
- Website: https://pngtoolz.com
- Email: admin@pngtoolz.com
